title: juno galatica
intro: Juno galatica, also known as Juniperus communis, is a coniferous plant species commonly referred to as juniper. The plant has been used in traditional medicine for its medicinal properties, which include its antibacterial, antifungal, and anti-inflammatory properties. The health benefits of juniper berry extract include its ability to aid in digestion, relieve respiratory issues such as bronchitis and coughs, and support urinary tract health. Juniper berries can be prepared into herbal teas, tinctures, and infusions, allowing for a range of preparations to suit individual needs.
